calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Juanita Murphy, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., for THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION.
Georgetta Lovett sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Edward Neal.
Does 1-10 dismissed.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 520 Jones Street, #702, San Francisco, CA 94102.
Per Diem Damages $2928.18
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs waived
for a Total Judgment of $2,928.18
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: N. Nayfach ; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides, Represented by Georgetta Levitt.
Michael Rossoff, Attorney for the plaintiff.
Defendant Edward Neal is not present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant Edward Neal. The trial date of July 28,2014 remains on calendar. (JPT/501)
